storyboard.content: I have been going to the bathroom much less often than usual and my stool is harder than normal.
I have also been having mild cramping in my belly.
Drinking more water and eating more fiber has helped a little but has not fully fixed the problem.
These changes in my bowel habits have been going on for about 2 months and have stayed stable.
The discomfort is mild and is not severely limiting my daily life.
I am a 50-year-old man. I have a sedentary lifestyle and my diet is low in fiber.
I have not seen any blood in my stool.
